edgeCases: pure render: RenderSessionRehydration now takes (r, ready []string, hasIncomplete bool); caller computes the ready set, renderer never touches disk/workflow state
no-deps backward compat: a planned feature with empty/omitted dependsOn derives to 'ready' and annotates (ready), not (planned) — tests updated accordingly
empty frontier: len(ready)==0 && !hasIncomplete -> 'Roadmap complete'; len(ready)==0 && hasIncomplete -> 'No features ready ... in-progress or blocked'

cycle/unknown/self-dep: Option B moved these checks off ValidateAnalysis onto ValidateDependencies(*Roadmap); coverage relocated to internal/roadmap/dependencies_test.go (2-node cycle, self-dep 1-node cycle, unknown slug, valid+nil graphs)
ValidateAnalysis new contract: role + markdown/json presence + full-feature coverage + analysis-references-unknown-feature only (no dependsOn)
planadvisor dependencyNames reads dependsOn from roadmap.json (Option B source of truth); fixtures updated to declare dependsOn on roadmap.json feature 'f'
rehydration emits the plural ready frontier (Ready to start now: + one pointer per ready feature) instead of a single 'Next feature to plan' line
nil roadmap: ReadySet/DeriveReadiness/ValidateDependencies remain nil-safe; rehydration stays silent on absent/invalid roadmap
